news.title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
news.summary: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.

news.title: NSA spies are reportedly using Anthropic’s Mythos, despite Pentagon feud
news.summary: NSA is said to be using Anthropic's restricted Mythos AI model.

news.title: CEO and CFO suddenly depart AI nuclear power upstart Fermi
news.summary: The startup, co-founded by former U.S. Energy Secretary Rick Perry, has faced headwinds with its AI campus in Texas.

news.title: Chinese tech workers are starting to train their AI doubles–and pushing back

news.title: A Humanoid Robot Set a Half-Marathon Record in China
news.summary: An autonomous robot from the company Honor ran a half marathon in 50:26, beating the human record by 7 minutes.

news.title: Prego Has a Dinner-Conversation-Recording Device, Capisce?
news.summary: The pasta-sauce company has partnered with the nonprofit StoryCorps on a device designed to record family conversations around the table and save them for all time.
